summary: Documentation Auto-Generation — build script producing CLI reference, MCP tools reference, and skills catalog from code metadata with CI freshness check

decisions.what: Hybrid approach: manual narrative docs + auto-generated reference docs
decisions.why: Features overview requires human narrative; CLI/MCP/skills references are mechanical and should never be hand-maintained
Features overview provides narrative; reference docs live separately and can be auto-generated
YAGNI — pnpm script is sufficient; promote to CLI later if needed

decisions.what: Auto-generate CLI reference, MCP tools, skills catalog; manual for features overview, personas, modules
decisions.why: Auto-generate what's mechanical (76 commands, 54 tools, 79 skills); write what needs judgment

decisions.what: CI freshness check via git diff --exit-code
decisions.why: Same pattern as coverage ratchet; fails if generated docs are stale
